sections.paragraph:
Original: דּתין דּתן

Transliteration: dôthân dôthayin

Phonetic: do'-thawn

BDB Definition:

Dothan = "two wells"
  1. a place in northern Palestine, 12 miles north of Samaria, the home of Elisha

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
